title: Torrential rains cause floods and landslides in northern and eastern Japan
summary: Authorities issue level 4 warnings for record rainfall in Hokkaido and the Kanto region, with landslides destroying homes and causing one fatality in Tochigi.

title: Iran accuses US of violating agreement and military attacks intensify
summary: While Iran suspends compliance with the memorandum, the United States launches continuous attacks on Iranian infrastructure and oil exceeds $80 a barrel.

title: Argentina and Spain contest the 2026 World Cup final with Messi seeking back-to-back championship
summary: The Argentine national team, reigning champions, face Spain in the final, with Lionel Messi leading the attack and promising to give it his all.

title: France and England prepare for World Cup third place amid political debates and environmental threats
summary: The race for top scorer continues, while pollution from fires in Canada puts the final at risk and the tournament is criticized for its political use.

title: Agreement between Shizuoka Prefecture and JR Central to begin construction of the linear train
summary: The pact allows the start of work on the most difficult section of the linear Shinkansen, which may be interrupted if unforeseen events arise according to the agreement conditions.

title: Arrested for abandoning the bodies of his girlfriend and daughter in the mountains of Nara
summary: The suspect confesses to having transported the corpses alone in his vehicle and abandoned them in the wooded area of Nara.

title: NPB day results: notable victories for SoftBank and DeNA's first shutout
summary: In Japanese professional baseball, SoftBank extends its lead, while DeNA achieves a complete game without bases on balls from Hōsuke Fukuzawa.

title: Yokozuna Ōnoshō dominates in sumo while ozeki Kotozakura suffers his third defeat
summary: In the sumo tournament, champion Ōnoshō shows his power, while ozeki Kotozakura continues in crisis with three consecutive defeats and maegashira Shishi loses his unbeaten record.

title: Japan rugby team falls to France in the nations tournament
summary: Japan loses 1-2 to France in the tournament, showing weaknesses in the aerial game and maul, according to reports.

title: Roki Sasaki impresses with 164 km/h fastball against the New York Yankees
summary: The Japanese Marlins pitcher shows his maximum speed and dominates the powerful Yankees offense, although he does not get the win.

title: Seventh anniversary of the arson attack on Kyoto Animation with tributes to the victims
summary: Employees and family members remember the 36 victims of the 2019 arson and reaffirm the legacy of the animation company.

title: Smoke incident on the Tokyu Toyoko line causes temporary service suspensions
summary: A train on the Tokyu Toyoko line emits smoke from the car floor, forcing suspension of service between Shibuya and Jiyugaoka with no injuries.

title: Defense Minister Koizumi says it is inevitable to debate the nuclear issue in Japan
summary: Shinjiro Koizumi suggests that Japan should consider nuclear debate following European examples, amid regional tensions.

title: Apple raises iPhone price in Japan by 10% due to weak yen
summary: The price increase boosts demand for used iPhones in the country, according to reports from Yahoo News and Asahi.

title: Hunter seriously injured after being attacked by a bear in Hokkaido
summary: The hunter who shot at a brown bear in the village of Sarabetsu was attacked by the animal, suffering serious injuries before the bear was killed.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi defends her management in parliament and promises to act with honesty
summary: Yoko Takaichi states that she will prioritize sincerity in parliament even if the session is extended, while her official schedule for July 18 is published.

title: Foreign Minister Motegi attends ASEAN summit amid struggle for regional influence
summary: Japan and the United States seek to counter Chinese influence in Southeast Asia, with the visit of Secretary of State Rubio and Motegi's participation in the meetings.

title: Advances in the Ryuo shogi tournament with key victories by Sugai and Sasaki
summary: In the final rounds of the Ryuo tournament, players Sugai and Sasaki achieve important victories that keep them in contention for the title.

title: Trump's alternative tariffs expire on July 24 and pave the way for new measures
summary: The tariffs on Chinese products end, while affected countries express objections and consider appeals to the WTO.

title: Zelensky evaluates dismissing the military commander-in-chief amid protests in Kiev
summary: Thousands of people demonstrate in the Ukrainian capital while reports circulate about the possible dismissal of General Valerii Zaluzhnyi.
